channel.title: Comments on: Interview with Jim Koch, Boston Beer Company – Ep. 56
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul Garcia
item.dc:creator: Paul Garcia
item.description: Jim Koch seems like such an awesome guy.
item.content:encoded: Jim Koch seems like such an awesome guy.

item.title: By: John Pinkerton
item.dc:creator: John Pinkerton
item.description:
I just wanted to dd as a follow up... Jim, thanks again for taking the time with BeerAmerica.TV and for your hospitality. The event you hosted for the Craft Brewers Conference reception was exceptional. As mentioned in the video,the beers we tried later that evening included very authentic (and tasty!) gueze, kriek, bavarian-style hefe weizen, and the list just goes on and on. The Boston Beer Company facility, there in Boston, is truly a brewer's playground... and Jim Koch appears to be one playful brewer.
Cheers for now, John Pinkerton
item.content:encoded:
I just wanted to dd as a follow up… Jim, thanks again for taking the time with BeerAmerica.TV and for your hospitality. The event you hosted for the Craft Brewers Conference reception was exceptional. As mentioned in the video,the beers we tried later that evening included very authentic (and tasty!) gueze, kriek, bavarian-style hefe weizen, and the list just goes on and on. The Boston Beer Company facility, there in Boston, is truly a brewer’s playground… and Jim Koch appears to be one playful brewer.

Cheers for now,
John Pinkerton
